paintings.title: Ananda
paintings.subtitle: Original Mandala Painting
paintings.inspiration: Painted during the first weeks of spring, Ananda — Sanskrit for 'bliss' — radiates outward from a golden core through rings of burnt sienna and soft coral, finishing in deep midnight blue.

paintings.title: Shanti
paintings.subtitle: Original Mandala Painting
paintings.inspiration: Shanti means peace. Cool teals and soft lavenders layer outward in perfect symmetry, evoking the stillness of a mountain lake at dawn.

paintings.title: Surya
paintings.subtitle: Original Mandala Painting
paintings.inspiration: Named for the sun, Surya blazes in deep ochres and saffrons, a painting that commands a wall and fills a room with warmth.

paintings.title: Chandra
paintings.subtitle: Original Mandala Painting
paintings.inspiration: Chandra — the moon — rendered entirely in silvers and ivory whites on a deep charcoal ground. Sold, but I'd love to create something in a similar spirit.

paintings.title: Dharani
paintings.subtitle: Original Mandala Painting
paintings.inspiration: Dharani means 'she who holds'. Soft pinks and sage greens bloom outward like petals — created during a period of deep gratitude.

paintings.title: Akasha
paintings.subtitle: Original Mandala Painting
paintings.inspiration: Akasha — ether, infinite space — is the largest in the Sacred Geometry collection. Deep indigos and ultramarines suggest a cosmos folded into perfect symmetry.

paintings.title: Prana
paintings.subtitle: Original Mandala Painting
paintings.inspiration: A small but energetic piece — vibrant magentas and turmeric yellows radiate life force from a tight, intricate centre.

paintings.title: Metta
paintings.subtitle: Original Mandala Painting
paintings.inspiration: Metta means loving kindness. Earthy terracottas and warm greens create a grounded, tender composition — perfect for a bedroom or meditation space.
